get.summary: Get project message count by year/month

post.summary: Invite a user to a project
Remove a user from a project

get.description: Retrieves a summary of the chat based on the specified type.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of summary to retrieve (default, markdown, literal).

get.description: Retrieves a list of chats based on the user's permissions and query parameters.
Retrieves messages for a specific chat.
Retrieves details of a specific chat.

post.summary: Ask a question in a chat
post.description: Sends a question to a specific chat and retrieves the AI's response. Supports streaming responses.
Creates a new chat with the provided details.
Updates the details of a specific chat.

post.summary: Generate a chart for a specific message
post.description: Generates a chart based on the data of a specific message in a chat.

chartFlag.description: The flag indicating the type of chart to generate.

400.description: Missing required parameters (chat_id, message_id, or chartFlag).

post.description: Updates the details of a specific question.

post.summary: Update a specific message in a chat
post.description: Updates the content of a specific message in a chat by its ID.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The ID of the message to update.

schema.description: The updated content of the message.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific message.
Retrieves a list of questions based on the user's permissions and query parameters.
Fetches a list of available question categories.
Retrieves details of a specific question.

post.description: Creates a new question with the provided details.

get.summary: Get validation data for a message
get.description: Retrieves validation data (graph and documents) for a specific message in a chat.
Retrieves a document from the knowledge service by its ID.

parameters.name: knowledge_id
parameters.description: The ID of the knowledge document.

get.description: Retrieves a list of commands. Supports filtering by type and options for flat or read-only views.

parameters.name: flat
parameters.description: Whether to return a flat list of commands.

400.description: Bad request. Could not retrieve commands.

put.description: Creates a new command with the provided details. Requires a valid license and appropriate access permissions.

query.description: The query string for the command.

application.description: The application associated with the command.

earliest_time.description: The earliest time for the query.

latest_time.description: The latest time for the query.

400.description: Bad request. The command could not be created.

get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific command by its ID.

parameters.name: commandId
parameters.description: The ID of the command to retrieve.

400.description: Bad request. Could not retrieve the command.

post.description: Updates the details of an existing command by its ID. Requires a valid license and appropriate access permissions.

parameters.name: commandId
parameters.description: The ID of the command to update.

name.description: The updated name of the command.

type.description: The updated type of the command.

config.description: Updated configuration details for the command.

400.description: Bad request. The command could not be updated.

delete.description: Deletes a specific command by its ID. Requires a valid license and appropriate access permissions.

parameters.name: commandId
parameters.description: The ID of the command to delete.

400.description: Bad request. The command could not be deleted.

get.description: Retrieve a list of flows with optional query parameters for flat, extended, and read-only views.

parameters.name: flat
parameters.description: Whether to return a flat list of flows.

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: Whether to include extended information about flows.

parameters.name: read_only
parameters.description: Whether to return flows in read-only mode.

put.description: Create a new flow with the provided details.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific flow by its ID.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: The ID of the flow to retrieve.

post.description: Update details of a specific flow by its ID.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: The ID of the flow to update.

delete.description: Delete a specific flow by its ID.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: The ID of the flow to delete.

post.description: Start a specific flow by its ID.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: The ID of the flow to start.

post.description: Stop a specific flow by its ID.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: The ID of the flow to stop.

force.description: Whether to force stop the flow.

get.summary: Get the status of a flow.
get.description: Retrieve the current status of a specific flow by its ID.

parameters.name: flowId
parameters.description: The ID of the flow to retrieve the status for.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all models with optional parsing, flattening, and read-only filters.

parameters.name: read_only
parameters.description: Whether to retrieve models in read-only mode.

put.description: Create a new model with the provided data.

get.description: Retrieve a specific model by its ID with optional parsing.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The ID of the model to retrieve.

post.description: Update an existing model by its ID with the provided data.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The ID of the model to update.

delete.description: Delete a specific model by its ID.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The ID of the model to delete.

post.description: Parse and retrieve a mapping preview based on the provided mapping data.

get.description: Retrieve the mapping of a specific model by its ID with optional parsing.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The ID of the model to retrieve the mapping for.

get.description: Retrieve a list of sources. Optionally filter by type or flatten the response.

200.description: When flat is true, returns a flat list of sources. Otherwise, returns a dictionary of sources.

put.description: Create a new source with optional file upload.

get.description: Retrieve a source by its ID.

post.description: Update an existing source by its ID.

delete.description: Delete a source by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve a signed URL for downloading the file associated with a source.

post.summary: Get a signed URL for uploading
post.description: Generates a signed URL for the frontend to upload a file directly to the storage provider.

uploadId.description: The unique ID for the upload.

expiredAt.description: The expiration time of the upload.

signedUrl.description: The signed URL for uploading the file.

400.description: Bad request. An error occurred while generating the signed URL.

put.description: Creates a flow based on the provided source data. The user must have the appropriate license and access permissions.

source.description: JSON string representing the source data.

model.description: JSON string representing the model data.

200.description: Successfully created or updated the flow.

400.description: Bad request. The input data is invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. The user does not have the required permissions.

project_permission_type_limit.description: List of allowed project permission types

projects_external_count_limit.description: Maximum number of external projects allowed

owner_id.description: User ID of the playbook owner.

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID associated with the playbook.

project_id.description: Project ID associated with the playbook.

protected.description: Indicates if the playbook is protected from edits/deletion.

actions.description: List of actions in the playbook.

updated_by.description: User ID of the last updater.
